message:
🐛 fix: tab click focuses tile in tile mode, fix blank terminals when no tiles checked (#110)

- Tab click now sets focusedTileId and focuses terminal in tile mode
- Inner tab name click also works in tile mode
- Fix dead state: tileMode=true with no checked tabs caused blank screen
  because single-view useEffects were gated on tileMode, not tileActive
- Introduce tileActive (tileMode && has checked tabs) to only skip
  single-view mounting when tiles are actually rendering

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
